case_title: JULIE LYNN ROSENBERG VS. JANET A. WHERRY

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROSENBERG, JULIE LYNN AS TO DEFENDANT WHERRY, JANET A. AN INDIVIDUAL DBA THE DISCOVERY CENTER SCHOOL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
